user.title: Vorwerk Kobold – Sign In
user.description: Enter the email address linked to your MyKobold account. A one-time code will be sent to that address.

code.title: Enter the verification code
code.description: A one-time code was sent to **{email}**. Enter it below.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Kobold cloud. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or code. Please request a new code and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Kobold account is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Kobold cloud. Please try again later.

set_schedule.name: Set Schedule
set_schedule.description: Replace the robot's entire cleaning schedule.

events.name: Events
events.description: List of schedule events. Each event requires: day (0-6), mode (Eco or Turbo), start_time (HH:MM).

add_schedule_event.name: Add/Update Schedule Event
add_schedule_event.description: Add or overwrite the event for a specific day.

remove_schedule_event.name: Remove Schedule Event
remove_schedule_event.description: Remove the event for a specific day.

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week to remove (0=Sunday … 6=Saturday).

custom_cleaning.name: Custom Cleaning
custom_cleaning.description: Start a cleaning session with explicit mode, navigation, and map options.

boundary_id.name: Boundary ID
boundary_id.description: Zone boundary ID from a persistent map.
